legend.automated: Verified in the authoring DOM by an it() block.
legend.deferred: Documented as it.skip() — requires login/activity/step bootstrap, Reader/student annotate-on-selection flows, copy-paste formatting, persistence, full a11y, or Publish/Reader lifecycle.

mappings.reason: Launch Studio URL + listing page — environment bootstrap handled by cy.openAuthoringTool, not a component assertion
Create math activity (basic info) — activity-creation flow outside authoring DOM
Start authoring redirect — activity-creation flow outside authoring DOM
Add Generic Step — step-creation flow; Annotation is a canvas element, not a Generic Step widget
Enter Step Title — step-wizard flow outside the Annotation element
Cancel button in step creation — step-wizard flow
Enter Instructions for Students — page-level field, not the Annotation element
Enter Instructions for Teachers — page-level field, not the Annotation element

mappings.it: TC_10 — Annotation component is placed successfully and a highlight label is added
TC_11 — Long label text is accepted and retained without truncation
TC_12 — Math/LaTeX payload is accepted in a label field
mappings.note: LaTeX accepted as text; rendered-equation verification is a Reader/Preview check (deferred)

mappings.it: TC_13 — Special characters / emoji are accepted in a label field

mappings.reason: Copy-paste formatted content (bold/italic) into annotation — clipboard + Reader rich-text flow

mappings.it: TC_15 — Highlight labels are capped at 5 (6th add is restricted)
TC_16 — Outline labels are capped at 5 (6th add is restricted)
mappings.note: Outline enabled via settings toggle first; directive addOutline caps at 5

mappings.it: TC_17 — Existing label can be edited and changes are reflected
TC_18 — A label row can be removed (delete) when more than one exists
mappings.note: remove-button renders only when section length > 1

mappings.reason: Annotate without selecting text → warning — Reader/student selection runtime, not authoring

mappings.it: TC_20 — Blank label is handled gracefully (no crash)

mappings.reason: Multiple annotations on same selection (stack/restrict) — Reader/student selection runtime
Save annotation then check in Reader — Publish + Reader flow
Annotate on embedded image (restrict/message) — Reader/student selection runtime

mappings.it: TC_24 — Both Highlight and Outline sections can be active together
TC_25 — Alt Text field (accessibility) is present and enforces a 2000-char limit
mappings.note: Alt Text presence automated; full screen-reader verification is a Reader check (deferred)

mappings.reason: Annotation visible in Reader after publish — Publish + Reader flow
Edit annotation and re-publish reflected in Reader — Publish + Reader flow
No UI overlap / visual glitches in Reader — visual assertion in Reader
